metadata.description: Internal Peach CX plugins: issue debugging, bug reporting, and ticket research workflows.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Debugging skills for investigating an issue against the codebase and prior work, code-first.

plugins.name: support
plugins.description: Bug-report skill that turns raw context or an interactive Q&A into a ready-to-file Shortcut story.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Ticket research: parallel internal, external, and business research agents plus a synthesis skill.
